message:
fix(e2e): increase scale-down timeout and remove backticks from comment

- Increase scale-down timeout from 4 to 6 minutes for multiple VA test
  to reduce flakiness in Kind emulated environment
- Remove backticks around /ok-to-test in bot comment per Copilot suggestion
  for better readability in email notifications

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -179,7 +179,7 @@ jobs:
                 owner: context.repo.owner,
                 repo: context.repo.repo,
                 issue_number: prNumber,
-                body: `👋 Thanks for your contribution!

This PR is from a fork, so the e2e tests require maintainer approval to run (they use GPU resources).

**For maintainers:** After reviewing the code, comment \`/ok-to-test\` to trigger the e2e tests.

**Note:** Please review the PR changes carefully before approving, as the tests will run with access to cluster resources.`
+                body: `👋 Thanks for your contribution!

This PR is from a fork, so the e2e tests require maintainer approval to run (they use GPU resources).

**For maintainers:** After reviewing the code, comment /ok-to-test to trigger the e2e tests.

**Note:** Please review the PR changes carefully before approving, as the tests will run with access to cluster resources.`
               });
             }
